text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian successfully outruns two of the
strongest racers for a spectacular spring Tenno
Sho win, sending the racecourse into a frenzy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her heart races at the prospect of meeting
powerful opponents in the senior year, where she
can aim at even greater heights.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen urges her to enter the autumn
Tenno Sho, the first race of the Senior Autumn
Triple Crown.
